data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Crew count and subcontractor tracking'. However, while the linked use case does mention crew counts (Concrete team: 6, Rebar crew: 4, Crane operator: 1), there is no evidence of subcontractor tracking. The absence of any details or confirmation regarding subcontractor tracking indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the requirement explicitly includes both crew count and subcontractor tracking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
